positive: A stylized, minimalist line art depiction of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. Include stylized constellations, celestial bodies, and flowing etheric patterns intertwining with the peaks. The composition should be highly symmetrical and suitable for apparel printing, featuring clean, sharp lines, strong negative space, and a limited, ethereal color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and metallic gold accents. Concept: Cosmic Wanderlust. Style: Modern illustration, geometric linework, Art Nouveau influence, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, noise, amateur, dirty, grain, multiple figures, extra limbs, poor anatomy, graffiti, photo-realistic, logos, trademarks
